title: SonarCloud external gate — separate governance workstream (remediation deferred)
goal: Establish SonarCloud as its own governed workstream, decoupled from the errcheck cleanup (2026-07-22-errcheck-cleanup) and the ops lock upgrade (deferred by user). Define the triage procedure (real bug vs legacy/accepted), acceptance criteria, and the remediation plan. Actual issue remediation is DEFERRED until SonarCloud dashboard access is available or a maintenance window is scheduled. SonarCloud Code Analysis currently FAILS on PRs (e.g. #193) but is NOT a blocking ruleset check — the `solo dev merge rules` ruleset only requires the `Quality Gates` check, which is green.

in: harness task packet + triage runbook (this packet) — governance-only
decision: SonarCloud is a non-blocking informational gate on PRs for now; tracked separately, not bundled into other PRs
deferred: actual SonarCloud issue remediation (needs dashboard access / maintenance window)
out: any code change in this packet (governance-only)
ops lock upgrade to base-v0.9.0 (deferred, user decision)

taskDoc: Follow-up from v0.9.0 release leftovers. User decision 2026-07-22: handle three leftovers; SonarCloud governed separately; ops deferred. No SonarCloud connector access in this environment, so the dashboard cannot be read; this packet scopes the work and defers execution.
contractAnchors: sonar-project.properties (to be added at remediation time)
